caption: A woman named "Nancy Ramya," as identified by on-screen text in the bottom-left corner of each frame, is captured in a medium close-up shot. She is positioned indoors against a plain white wall, with a light-colored curtain and a blue drape visible to her right. She wears a striped, button-down shirt and large black over-ear headphones. Throughout the sequence, she is speaking, with her facial expressions shifting from a neutral, focused gaze to an open-mouthed expression as she talks. Her head remains relatively stationary, while her lips move and her eyes blink across the frames. A neutral-colored surface, possibly a table or ledge, is visible behind her to the right. The lighting is consistent across the scenes, and there are no other people or moving objects present in the frame.
